howItWorks.intro: This basketball per calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Simplified PER
rules.formula: PER = (Pts + Reb×1.2 + Ast×1.5 + Stl×2 + Blk×2 - TO) / Min × 36

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: League average is 15. Above 20 is All-Star level, above 25 is MVP caliber.

faq.q: Is this the official PER formula?
faq.a: This is a simplified version. The official PER uses pace adjustments and league averages.
